status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Real Camera SDK
features.user_visible_behavior: System receives images from real IDS/Basler camera instead of simulator.
verification: Connect real camera to the network.
Run the new real camera service.
Trigger a capture command and verify image is received over JSON-TCP interface.

features.title: Connect Real FX5U PLC
features.user_visible_behavior: System communicates with physical PLC at its actual IP address.
verification: Set PLC IP in .env
Start pc_controller.py
Verify SLMP handshake and heartbeat with physical PLC.

features.title: Calibration
features.user_visible_behavior: System accurately maps PCB dimensions to physical XY table movement.
verification: Run calibration routine.
Verify fov_step_mm and margin_mm match physical measurements.

features.title: AI Server interface
features.user_visible_behavior: AI inference engine can update image status to PASS/FAIL.
verification: Simulate AI engine sending PUT /images/{id} with condition payload.
Verify database and UI update correctly.

features.title: Connect Real NAS/MinIO
features.user_visible_behavior: Images are successfully synced to the physical NAS server.
verification: Configure MINIO_ENDPOINT.
Run sync_to_server.py.
Verify images appear in NAS storage.

features.title: Phase 2: Build Core Engine
features.user_visible_behavior: Backend services can run as compiled Windows executables.
verification: Run PyInstaller on api/main.py and pc_controller.py.
Verify .exe files run without Python installed.

features.title: Phase 3: Windows Services
features.user_visible_behavior: Compiled .exe files run automatically on Windows startup.
verification: Register .exe using NSSM.
Restart Windows and verify services are running.

features.title: Phase 4: Engineer Tool
features.user_visible_behavior: Engineers use a compiled GUI to configure and restart services.
verification: Refactor launcher.py to AOI_ConfigTool.exe.
Verify GUI can stop/start services and view logs.

features.title: Phase 5: Operator Dashboard
features.user_visible_behavior: Operators launch a native desktop app for the React UI.
verification: Build React UI with Electron into AOI_Dashboard.exe.
Run .exe and verify UI connects to API.

features.title: Extract simulation/shared_protocol.py
features.user_visible_behavior: Developers modify protocol in one place without manually copying.
verification: Move shared_protocol.py to a common package or use symlink.
Verify pc_controller and plc_sim still run.

features.title: Identify disabled steps in launcher.py
features.user_visible_behavior: Launcher has no dead code for disabled monitor cards.
verification: Review and either remove or re-enable the commented out 'monitor' card.
Verify launcher still opens.

features.title: Fix /services/status endpoint
features.user_visible_behavior: Status endpoint works cross-platform or is clearly documented as Windows-only.
verification: Refactor endpoint to use psutil instead of wmic, or add OS-checks.
Verify endpoint returns correct status.
